drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t;

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t
	(
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [monthbegindate] nvarchar(50),
	 [monthenddate] nvarchar(50),
	 [ageatendyear] bigint,
	 [gendercode] nvarchar(50),
	 [statecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [zip3value] nvarchar(100),
	 [raceethnicitycode] nvarchar(50),
	 [payergroupcode] nvarchar(50),
	 [payertypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [productcode] nvarchar(50),
	 [medicalindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [rxindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [macontracttypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [groupplantypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaissuerstatecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [acagrandfatheredindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaonexchangeindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [acametallevel] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaactuarialvalue] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourceid] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t;

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t
	(
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [monthbegindate] nvarchar(50),
	 [monthenddate] nvarchar(50),
	 [ageatendyear] bigint,
	 [gendercode] nvarchar(50),
	 [statecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [zip3value] nvarchar(100),
	 [raceethnicitycode] nvarchar(50),
	 [payergroupcode] nvarchar(50),
	 [payertypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [productcode] nvarchar(50),
	 [medicalindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [rxindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [macontracttypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [groupplantypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaissuerstatecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [acagrandfatheredindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaonexchangeindicator] nvarchar(50),
	 [acametallevel] nvarchar(50),
	 [acaactuarialvalue] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourceid] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

--Uncomment the 4 lines below to create a stored procedure for data pipeline orchestration​
--CREATE PROC bulk_load_stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t
--AS
--BEGIN
COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t
(memberuid 1, monthbegindate 2, monthenddate 3, ageatendyear 4, gendercode 5, statecode 6, zip3value 7, raceethnicitycode 8, payergroupcode 9, payertypecode 10, productcode 11, medicalindicator 12, rxindicator 13, macontracttypecode 14, groupplantypecode 15, acaindicator 16, acaissuerstatecode 17, acagrandfatheredindicator 18, acaonexchangeindicator 19, acametallevel 20, acaactuarialvalue 21, sourceid 22, createddate 23)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Inovalon/Inbound/control_consolidated_enrollment_monthly_combined.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 1
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

SELECT count(*) FROM customer.stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t
GO
--7888894

SELECT count(*) FROM customer.stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t
GO
